title: Workshop: Build an Oral-History Audio Archive
summary: Workshop: Build an Oral-History Audio Archive uses an original oral-history archive build scenario to retrieve earlier HTML skills, add a bounded artifact layer, and verify transfer with source and browser evidence.
objectives: Retrieve html text headings lists, html links urls, html audio without step-by-step imitation.
Produce and verify a real oral-history archive build artifact or evidence report.
Preserve earlier valid requirements while diagnosing changed content and constraints.

starterFiles.html: <!-- Build the public information artifact here. -->

options.text: Oral-history archive build case 3: once an audio file plays, controls, fallback, and a transcript are optional accessibility extras.
Oral-history archive build case 3: usable audio needs controls, supported sources, fallback, and an equivalent transcript.
Oral-history archive build case 3: a one-sentence summary is always equivalent to a detailed emergency advisory.

content.text: Reconstruct the oral-history archive build sequence by dependency, not by how familiar each term looks.

options.text: oral-history archive build phase 8.1: identify the destination and user intent
oral-history archive build phase 8.2: choose absolute, relative, fragment, email, or telephone URL syntax
oral-history archive build phase 8.3: write link text that names the destination or action
oral-history archive build phase 8.4: activate the link and verify the resulting location
